title: acacia horrida subsp. benadirensis
intro: Acacia horrida subsp. benadirensis, also known as the Benadir thorn tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Acacia horrida subsp. benadirensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
